Case Study • Various

How we helped Smiling Rocks Publishes Annual Sustainability Report

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Smiling Rocks, a next-generation fine jewelry and lab-grown diamond brand, today released its Annual Sustainability Report, reinforcing its mission to transform the jewelry industry through transparency, innovation, and responsibility. The report outlines Smiling Rocks’ environmental, social, and governance (ESG) achievements while showcasing its continued efforts to create a positive impact beyond business.

Key Highlights of the Smiling Rocks Sustainability Report

  • Environmental Responsibility & Carbon Neutral Journey – By promoting lab-grown diamonds and using recycled metals, Smiling Rocks has reduced its environmental footprint. The brand is taking steps towards becoming a carbon neutral jewelry company through energy efficiency, sustainable packaging, and offset initiatives.

  • Ethical Jewelry & Responsible Sourcing – Strengthening supply chain transparency with robust supplier codes of conduct and sustainable sourcing practices, ensuring Smiling Rocks stays true to its vision of responsible luxury.

  • Community & Social Responsibility – A percentage of every jewelry purchase is dedicated to global causes, supporting education, medical aid, environment, and animal welfare. These initiatives are at the heart of Smiling Rocks’ mission to create purpose-driven jewelry.

  • Transparency in ESG Reporting – The Sustainability Report aligns with global ESG reporting standards, reflecting Smiling Rocks’ commitment to accountability and transparency for stakeholders, customers, and investors.

Message from Smiling Rocks

At Smiling Rocks, sustainability is not a choice, it is our foundation. With our lab-grown diamonds and sustainable jewelry collections, we aim to redefine luxury while making a positive impact on people and the planet, said
Mr. Zulu Ghevariya, CEO & Co-Founder, Smiling Rocks

Message from Growlity – ESG & Sustainability Partner

As the ESG and Sustainability Partner of Smiling Rocks, Growlity has guided the brand in strengthening its sustainability roadmap.

Smiling Rocks’ Sustainability Report demonstrates how luxury can be both beautiful and responsible. By integrating ESG practices and transparent reporting, they are setting strong benchmarks for the global jewelry industry. At Growlity, we are proud to partner with them in advancing this journey towards a sustainable and impactful future,” said
Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO, Growlity Inc. USA.

About Smiling Rocks

Smiling Rocks is a next-generation sustainable jewelry and lab-grown diamond brand committed to ethical practices and social impact. By combining cutting-edge designs with responsible sourcing and ESG-driven initiatives, Smiling Rocks is shaping the future of sustainable luxury. Every purchase contributes to global causes in education, medical support, animal welfare, and environmental conservation, ensuring jewelry that delivers both beauty and purpose.

About Growlity

Growlity is a global sustainability advisory firm helping businesses embed ESG, climate action, and responsible growth strategies. With the belief in “Growth with Sustainability”, Growlity has served 200+ clients across 25+ countries in building sustainable business models.
